<h1 align="center">Download Outworked 0.4.3</h1>

<p align="center">
  <strong>Outworked is a desktop app that gives Claude Code a cutsomizable office of agents.<br/>
  Hire agents. Give them roles. Watch them write code, interact with the web, send messages,<br/>
  and run scheduled tasks — and make the office yours.</strong>
</p>

## What's New

**v0.4.3** — Better bg handling for scheduled tasks.

## Download

| Platform              | File                                                                                                                     |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | [`Outworked-0.4.3-arm64.dmg`](https://github.com/outworked/outworked/releases/download/v0.4.3/Outworked-0.4.3-arm64.dmg) |

> The `.zip`, `.blockmap`, and `.yml` files are for auto-updates — you don't need to download these manually. Existing installs will update automatically.

## Requirements

- [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) installed and authenticated

## How to Install

1. Download the .dmg file above.
2. Open the .dmg file you downloaded.
3. Drag the app into your apps folder.
